row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a curved road with slight rightward drift.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: A vehicle ahead is moving forward in the same lane; trajectory lines indicate smooth path following.

semantic.scene_summary: A multi-panel view of a suburban or campus-like environment with paved roads, trees, buildings, and clear sky. The scene includes curbs, lane markings, and roadside infrastructure.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are clearly visible with natural lighting and no significant occlusion.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Consistent forward movement across frames; no abrupt jumps or discontinuities in object positions.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles and static objects maintain stable presence and relative positioning over time.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and environmental structures remain coherent without warping or distortion.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle appears to be moving forward steadily along a gently curving road.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards or risky interactions are visible; traffic flow seems calm and predictable.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar layout to Row 1 but with noticeable blurring and reduced clarity. Road features, trees, and buildings are present but less defined.
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant blur affects readability of fine details; some objects appear smeared or merged.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears smoother than real video but lacks sharp transitions; possible temporal smoothing artifacts.
logical.object_continuity: Objects persist across frames but show reduced definition; minor flickering or ghosting may be present.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall structure is preserved but exhibits softening and slight warping at boundaries.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego motion continues forward, consistent with reference, though visual feedback is degraded.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene clarity may impair accurate perception of obstacles or lane boundaries, potentially affecting downstream decisions.

artifacts_or_instabilities: temporal smoothing causing loss of detail
